Re-Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
KYLE BACH, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: HERZER FINANCIAL LLC and HERZER FINANCIAL MORTGAGE FUND
BRIAN C. PEDERSEN, ESQ. for defendant and opposing party: PAUL THOMPSON

THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF HERZER FINANCIAL LLC and HERZER FINANCIAL MORTGAGE FUND's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $710,000. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.
Defendant's claim of exemption is granted as to household furnishings and personal effects, jewelry and heirlooms, and private retirement accounts.
Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is granted, No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.)
